haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL ISSUES: Workflow references non-existent test file (matrix.test.ts) and fixtures directory (fixtures/basic.json) — will fail immediately. Environment variable bug: line 37 uses `${INPUT_FIXTURE}` without `${{ }}` wrapper, breaking fixture parameter passing. Missing package.json/lock file references. Dead code: index.ts unused. Include/exclude extension logic (matrix.ts:59-77) is complex without sufficient comments or tests. The task requires all tests run via act with comprehensive test

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. Correctly handles Cartesian product and GHA include/exclude semantics. Workflow follows best practices (permissions, frozen-lockfile). Uses Bun efficiently for both execution and inline JSON processing (line 42 of workflow).
